description: You are a satellite operations engineer. Translate the plain-text Payload Operations Request (POR) located at /home/ga/Documents/POR-INST-2026-084.txt into a functional Python automation script saved to /home/ga/Desktop/observation_sequence.py. The script must execute the requested sequence of commands against the OpenC3 COSMOS system using the JSON-RPC API (endpoint: http://localhost:2900/openc3-api/api, method: cmd_no_hazardous_check, password: Cosmos2024!) or the /usr/local/bin/cosmos-api CLI tool. Implement the precise timing delays requested in the POR and ensure the script runs autonomously.
